next_machine_action: Import or scrape allowed public bounty listings into a local JSON file, then score them against the task_types in this plan.

automation_loop: Collect listings from allowed public pages, platform APIs, or human-exported CSV/JSON.
Run scripts/ops/collect_paid_task_listings.py to collect public GitHub bounty candidates.
Run scripts/ops/score_paid_task_listings.py against the local listings JSON.
Score by payout, fit to repo skills, deadline, rules, and probability of acceptance.
Select one task at a time to avoid spam and duplicate low-quality submissions.
Generate a local work plan and proof checklist.
Implement the work in a disposable branch or worktree.
Human approves platform login, final submission, wallet, and tax/legal responsibility.
Record transaction hash only after payout is confirmed on the selected network.

claim_gate.claim_boundary: This pipeline proves a legal automation plan and local task-selection workflow. It does not prove platform account access, accepted assignments, merged pull requests, approved submissions, received funds, tax compliance, or settlement finality.

pipeline.goal: Find legitimate paid online tasks, select tasks that can be completed by AI-assisted engineering work, prepare or execute the work locally, submit through the platform's allowed flow, and route payouts or invoices toward wallet 0x6017613e80d7893EB2aD5c0585b3f1f88CD6e099 where supported.
hard_no: No fake engagement, review manipulation, spam, or mass low-quality submissions.
No CAPTCHA bypass, credential scraping, or account creation in another person's name.
No private keys or seed phrases in chat, repo, logs, or generated docs.
No claim that funds were earned without a confirmed transaction or platform payout record.

sources.allowed_ai_role: Agent can list bounties, prepare code, submit PRs after one-time human authorization.
sources.human_gate: GitHub OAuth device flow and local wallet/key handling.
sources.name: GH Bounty
sources.payout_style: SOL on Solana through onchain escrow.
sources.search_hint: Use the platform app or MCP endpoint to list GitHub bounty tasks.
sources.source_basis: Official page states AI agents can earn bounties and get paid in SOL after onboarding.

sources.allowed_ai_role: Agent can monitor GitHub issues and prepare PRs; payout depends on merge.
sources.human_gate: GitHub login and payout wallet setup.
sources.name: GitWork
sources.payout_style: USDC/Solana bounty on merged GitHub pull requests.
sources.search_hint: Search GitHub issues and GitWork bounties by language, tests, and bounty amount.
sources.source_basis: Official page describes GitHub issue bounties and automatic payment when PRs are merged.

sources.allowed_ai_role: Agent can collect public GitHub bounty issues, score them, patch code, and draft PR evidence.
sources.human_gate: Account, payout setup, task rules, and final PR/submission approval.
sources.name: Algora
sources.payout_style: USD bounty on GitHub issues, usually paid after accepted or merged work.
sources.search_hint: Search GitHub issues with the Algora bounty label and parse dollar amount labels or /bounty comments.
sources.source_basis: Official pages describe creating bounties with /bounty comments and paying when work is merged.

sources.allowed_ai_role: Agent can find listings, draft submissions, code, and proof-of-work packages.

sources.name: Superteam Earn

sources.allowed_ai_role: Agent can parse task requirements, prepare PRs/docs, and draft application text.

sources.name: Dework

sources.search_hint: Search DAO tasks with GitHub sync, code, docs, infra, and bug-fix labels.
sources.source_basis: Official page describes task bounties, GitHub sync, and wallet payments.

sources.allowed_ai_role: Agent can build BUIDLs, draft reports, implement code, and prepare submissions.
sources.human_gate: Hackathon rules, account, team submission, and sponsor review.
sources.name: DoraHacks
sources.payout_style: Hackathon, grant, DAO bounty, bug bounty, and mini-bounty rewards.
sources.search_hint: Search hackathons, DAO bounties, mini bounties, and bug bounties matching x0tta6bl4 assets.
sources.source_basis: Terms describe hackathons, bounties, DAO bounties, bug bounties, mini bounties, and grants.
